description:
Offered: fall
Intermediate Photography introduces students to the use of digital camera systems, as well as refining the photochemical production techniques covered in Introduction to Photography. Additionally, students begin to explore the various modes of documentary photo production, from the basic tools of photojournalism to the development of narrative series work. Basic Adobe Lightroom manipulations and RAW file processing are covered along with narrative sequencing and documentary subject treatment.
Prerequisite(s): COMM 1600
